description: Tuned gains for 150g drone. Rate controller validated in sim: t90=20ms roll/pitch, 30ms yaw. SS error <0.5 deg/s. Cascade: 40/40 survival, reward 418, SS pos error 29mm.

position_z.notes: bandwidth ~2.45 rad/s, overdamped. Anti-windup clamped to ±0.30.

attitude.notes: Rate loop bandwidth = kd = 70 rad/s. Outer att ratio = kp/kd = 8 rad/s per rad error.

yaw.notes: Rate loop bandwidth = 50 rad/s. Outer yaw ratio = kp/kd = 5 rad/s per rad error.

rate.notes: I term compensates CoM pitch torque (~2.4 mNm). Converges in ~1.5s.

tuning_notes.performance: 40/40 survival, mean reward 418 ± 37, SS pos error 29 ± 12 mm. Rate: t90=20ms roll/pitch, 30ms yaw, overshoot <3%, SS rate error <0.5 deg/s.
